CAMPAIGN TypeS The wide varicty of cultures and technology levels present: ed in the BattleTech universe offer an unlimited selection of exciting campaign settings; The following short list of possible starting adventures Or campaign settings intended t0 provide gamemasters with few ideas and t0 get the creative juices flowing:

Free Traders The characters are merchants plying the space lanes look- Ing tor new markets for their goods just trying t0 pay the bills. Though they try to keep low profile, they continually find themselves getting involved in things they shouldn" Dropping Into hot zone with battle raging nearby, smuggling, making border runs for illegal goods or being conscripted by the military rescue mission are only few examples_ For Clan  characters, specifically merchant-caste charac ters this setting can involve even more danger.
